description: You are a Food Service Consultant designing a multi-brand commercial 'ghost kitchen' (cloud kitchen) facility. The open commercial building shell is pre-loaded in Sweet Home 3D. Your task is to partition and furnish this open plan into a high-efficiency production facility ready for health department review. Partition the open floor plan to create at least two physically enclosed spaces (e.g., a Walk-In Cold Storage room and a Delivery Driver Pickup Lobby) using at least three new wall segments. Define and name at least four room zones (e.g., 'Brand A Line', 'Brand B Line', 'Walk-In Cooler', 'Dishwashing', 'Driver Lobby') and apply distinct floor treatments to at least three of these zones. Furnish the facility with at least 6 cooking or cooling appliances, 8 prep surfaces (work tables, counters, or islands), 4 sanitation items (sinks, washbasins, or dishwashers), and 6 storage units (shelving units, racks, or cabinets). Add at least two dimension lines across main prep aisles to document clearance widths for OSHA/health compliance and save the completed layout.
